# Kennion Benefit Advisors

> An employee benefits agency headquartered in Vestavia, Alabama. Kennion designs and administers private group health, dental, vision, supplemental, and level-funded insurance programs for employer groups across the United States. Our proprietary actuarial rating engine delivers premium coverage at significantly lower rates than groups can access through traditional broker channels.

Kennion Benefit Advisors operates a private benefits program that is not available through outside brokers or consultants. The program combines an in-house actuarial rating engine with composite reference-based pricing to produce risk-adjusted premiums for small and mid-sized employer groups. Underwriting and approval are required, and not all groups are accepted.

## Services

- [Group Health Insurance](https://www.kennion.com/): 15+ medical plan designs including level-funded, self-funded, and fully-insured options. Composite reference-based pricing with in-house actuarial underwriting.
- [Level-Funded Health Plans](https://www.kennion.com/): Level-funded medical plans for small and mid-sized employer groups. Combines the cash-flow predictability of fully-insured with the savings potential of self-funded.
- [Group Dental Insurance](https://www.kennion.com/): 6+ dental plan designs bundled with the Kennion benefits program.
- [Group Vision Insurance](https://www.kennion.com/): 3+ vision plan designs bundled with the Kennion benefits program.
- [Supplemental Insurance](https://www.kennion.com/): 10+ supplemental coverages including accident, critical illness, and hospital indemnity.

## How It Works

1. **Submit your group.** Employers register at kennion.com and upload a census.
2. **Risk screen.** The Kennion Risk Screen runs a deterministic underwriting model on the census (demographic, geographic, and family-composition factors plus an AI residual trained on Kennion's claims history) to classify the group as Preferred Risk, Standard Risk, or High Risk.
3. **Receive a proposal.** Qualified groups receive a custom proposal with monthly rates across 15+ medical plan designs, plus dental, vision, and supplemental options.
4. **Enroll.** Approved groups onboard and begin coverage on the chosen effective date.

## About

- **Headquarters:** 2828 Old 280 Court, Vestavia, Alabama 35243
- **Coverage area:** United States, with concentration in the Southeast (AL, GA, MS, TN, FL)
- **Founder:** Hunter Shepherd
- **Experience:** Decades building benefits programs nationwide
- **Differentiator:** Private program with in-house actuarial rating - not available through traditional broker channels

## Tools and Disclosures

- **Live savings estimator:** Available on the homepage; provides an illustrative monthly and annual savings estimate based on group size, average age, and current monthly bill. Estimates are illustrative only; exact rates require a census submission and underwriting review.
- **Kennion Risk Screen:** Proprietary group-level underwriting model; tier classification only - the screen does not produce a bindable rate. Plans are priced by the Kennion Actuarial Rater after the screen completes.

## Contact

- **Submit a group:** https://www.kennion.com/register
- **Schedule a call:** https://calendly.com/kennion/call
- **General support:** support@kennion.com
- **Sales (Hunter Shepherd):** hunter@kennion.com - 205-641-0469

## What This Site Indexes

Only the homepage (https://www.kennion.com/) is publicly indexable. Customer dashboards, the admin cockpit, individual quote pages, login flows, and the API are intentionally not indexed - they require authentication and are not relevant to public discovery.
